message:
fix: guard card.position access to prevent page_render errors on /deploy (#3622)

Cards loaded from localStorage may lack a `position` property (old format
or corrupted data), causing "undefined is not an object (evaluating
'e.position')" and "undefined is not an object (evaluating
'card.position')" errors reported by GA4 on the /deploy page.

Add optional chaining and fallback defaults (`{ w: 4, h: 2 }`) at every
`card.position` access site across 10 files. Also normalize position on
load in dashboardHooks to prevent cascading failures that surface as
"Can't find variable: useClusters" when module evaluation aborts early.

Closes #3598

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ function computeGridLayout(cards: CardLike[], gridColumns: number): GridPosition
   let col = 0
 
   for (let i = 0; i < cards.length; i++) {
-    const w = Math.min(cards[i].position.w, gridColumns)
+    const w = Math.min(cards[i].position?.w || 4, gridColumns)
     if (col + w > gridColumns) {
       row++
       col = 0
